title: Follow Us On:
description: NewsTechnologyTechnologyAllNewsReviewsMobilesVideosTalking PointsTech TipsAndroid OSBuying GuideFeaturesAdvertisementFeaturesFrom Sunak to Sriram, everyone wants India to use American AI. But should India?At the India AI Impact Summit, Western companies are pitching themselves as AI producers and they want Indians to be AI consumers. This reflects in statements from White House policy advisor Sriram to Rishi Sunak to Anthropic CEO Dario Amodei. India should keep an open mind on it, and Sarvam in its sight.NewsIndia's Sarvam takes on ChatGPT and Gemini with Indus AI appIndia's homegrown AI startup Sarvam has quietly released its AI chat app Indus on app stores. The app is expected to work similar to ChatGPT, allowing users to interact with AI in multiple languages. However, there is a waitlist for now.NewsDario Amodei says Anthropic will need fewer software engineers soonAnthropic CEO Dario Amodei discussed the potential consequences of AI on the job market. He also stated that Anthropic itself may not require as many software engineers as it has at the moment.advertisementNewsSamsung Galaxy S26 series launching on February 25, here is what you can expectSamsung is just days away from launching the Galaxy S26 series. Rumours over the company's latest flagship lineup have been making the rounds for some time now. Let's take a deep dive to see what you can expect from the Galaxy S26 series.NewsNew low-cost MacBook, iPhone 17e: What Apple may launch on March 4Apple is set to host its first event of 2026. The Cupertino giant is expected to launch a bunch of new products, ranging from an affordable MacBook to the iPhone 17e. Here are all the details.NewsClaude vs Grok: Which AI codes best? Elon Musk says soon it will not even matterTech billionaire Elon Musk claims that soon, coding agents will become so reliable that it wouldn't matter which agent you used, be it Grok Code, or Anthropic's Claude Code, or perhaps something else.NewsSam Altman compares AI and human energy use, Sridhar Vembu pushes backOpenAI CEO Sam Altman has argued that humans too consume a lot of energy amid criticism over the resources used by AI data centres. Here is how Zoho co-founder Sridhar Vembu responded.NewsSam Altman says some companies are using AI as excuse to fire employeesOpenAI CEO, Sam Altman, has claimed that while AI is impacting jobs, many companies are using it as an excuse to fire people, a method he calls, "AI washing."Talking PointsTalking PointsAI will not kill Indian SaaS, but will make it bleed with 1000 cutsTalking PointsThe Explainability Illusion: Wall Street's most dangerous fairy taleTalking PointsTech in 2025: Old but mighty, Nikon Z8 is kind of tech that brings joyTalking PointsBuying TV in 2026: What matters, what does not, and is OLED vs QLED still a thing?View AlladvertisementNewsGoogle DeepMind chief says AI development could soon reach a choke pointArtificial Intelligence is developing rapidly, with companies such as Google and Anthropic periodically bringing more advanced models. However, Google DeepMind CEO Demis Hassabis has warned that one factor could put all this growth at a choke point.FeaturesIndia AI Impact Summit defines Indian tech ambitions, to see this look beyond chaosWhile chaos brought about by a huge crowd and early teething issues in logistics were real, the India AI Impact Summit 2026 subtly achieved something bigger: It proved that was no longer just an AI data market, but an emerging global stage for collaboration, investment and innovation.NewsNothing Phone 4a series launching on March 5, it will have Glyph Bar and Qualcomm chipNothing is set to release the Phone 4a series soon. Ahead of the launch, the London-based phonemaker has teased its latest iteration of the Glyph interface – a Glyph Bar with mini-LEDs. Here is how it looks.NewsOpenAI is set to launch ChatGPT AI smart speaker, here is how much it may costOpenAI is said to be working on AI-hardware devices for some time now. A new report hints that the first product from the Sam Altman-led startup could be an AI smart speaker with a camera. Here are all the details.NewsLivspace fires 1,000 employees, co-founder quits, in massive AI shakeupLivspace, a Bengaluru-based home decor firm has laid off 1,000 employees as the startup focuses on lowering cost and transition towards using more AI. Livspace's cofounder, Saurabh Jain, has left too.advertisementReviewsReviewsVivo V70 Elite review: Wholesome package with good cameras and decent performanceReviewsOppo Pad 5 review: Large screen and premium design steal the showReviewsDell Pro Plus Earbuds review: Perfect for office and work, OK for musicReviewsTecno Pova Curve 2 review: Unique design and long battery lifeReviewsRedmi Pad 2 Pro review: Long battery, reliable performanceWHAT’S HAPPENING INTVMagazineBusinessPuzzlesLife+StyleElection HubIndiaSouthMoreNewsAfter SaaS shock, new Anthropic Claude AI update sends cybersecurity stocks crashingAnthropic announced Claude Code Security on Friday, bringing cybersecurity features to its AI model. This in turn tumbled the stocks of major cybersecurity players such as Crowdstrike and Cloudflare. This comes weeks after Claude Cowork's SaaS scare.Talking PointsAI will not kill Indian SaaS, but will make it bleed with 1000 cutsThe rumours suggesting Indian SaaS is dead are greatly exaggerated. But it also doesn't mean that pain is not ahead.TechnologyMicrosoft Gaming chief Phil Spencer retires after 38 years; Asha Sharma to leadInsider Asha Sharma, previously leading AI product development at Microsoft, has been appointed executive vice president and CEO of Microsoft Gaming. Sharma said she would refocus on strengthening the Xbox ecosystem amid rising costs, slowing gaming revenues and intense competition from Sony's PlayStation.NewsiPhone Fold launch in 2026: Leaked price, battery, design, display and other detailsAfter years of watching rivals experiment with foldables, Apple is likely preparing to enter the category in 2026 with a book-style iPhone that focuses on durability, battery life, and a nearly crease-free display. Here are the leaked details of the upcoming iPhone Fold's price, battery, design, display and more.TRENDING TOPICSPlay Time!T20 World CupPM ModiDonald TrumpDhurandhar 2TariffsRahul GandhiCBSEEmmanuel MacronBorder 2Videos00:31:16VideoIndia Today AI Summit 2026: Lawmakers don't care about our privacy, says expert00:22:23TechnologyIndia Today AI Summit 2026: India has phenomenal smartphone scale, Ericsson APAC CTO says00:25:49TechnologyIndia aims to shift from talent hub to global AI service leader: Jitin Prasada00:18:58VideoIndia Today AI Summit 2026: MIT Prof Raskar says everyone will have AI agent soonView AllPHOTOS09Redmi 15C 5G first look: MediaTek chip and 6,000mAh battery for Rs 12,49908iQOO 15 arrives in India at Rs 72,999: First look08Sony brings flagship WH-1000XM6 headphones in India: First Look10First look at iPhone Air, iPhone 17, iPhone 17 Pro, Watch 11 and more09Pixel 10 and Pixel 10 Pro XL quick look: Specs, India prices and other key detailsFeaturesLaunched This Week: Dyson Pencil Wash, Haier Mini LED range and 3 more new gadgets to check outAmid all the AI buzz this week at India AI Impact Summit 2026, several new gadgets quietly made their debut. From Dyson's ultra-slim PencilWash cleaner to Haier's big-screen Mini LED TVs and Whirlpool's summer-ready AC range, there's plenty of fresh tech across categories to check out.NewsRealme P4 Lite launched in India, has 6,300mAh battery and price is less than Rs 10,000Realme P4 Lite 4G launched in India. This is a budget phone with a starting price of Rs 9,999. The smartphone comes with a massive 6,300 mAh battery.NewsAnant Raj and Submer sign MoU at India AI Impact Summit 2026, will build sovereign cloud infrastructureAs the sovereign tech infrastructure gets more important, Anant Raj and Submer have signed a strategic MoU at the India AI Impact Summit 2026.NewsSamsung made a new Bixby, says it has agentic capabilitySamsung has announced a new version of Bixby which is seemingly more up-to-speed with the AI era. The new Bixby which is part of One UI 8.5 has agentic capabilities and understands context more easily than before, the company says.Tech Stories From Aajtakआ रहा सैमसंग का सबसे पावरफुल, इस सप्ताह होगा लॉन्चReview: बिना स्क्रीन वाला फिटनेस बैंड, महीने भर चलती है बैटरीफोन आए और कहें ‘आप अरेस्ट हो चुके हैं’… PM मोदी ने दिया सेफ्टी मंत्रAmazon पर बंपर ऑफर, आधे से भी कम दाम में AC और फ्रिजकौन हैं आशा शर्मा, जिन्हें बनाया गया माइक्रोसॉफ्ट गेमिंग की नई CEOAdvertisementTrending Videos01:12:53UNPOLITICSUnPolitics: Milind Deora on Congress exit, Mahayuti role, 2029 South Mumbai bid00:21:03POST-MORTEMPost-Mortem: Disturbing crimes rooted in obsession, emotional turmoil shock India00:28:12HEALTH 360Health 360: India's rare disease patients struggle while Rs 271 crore funds unspent00:00:32CelebritiesVideo: Shah Rukh Khan visits Lilavati Hospital to meet Salim KhanAdvertisement

title: Sriram Krishnan, Rishi Sunak, India AI Impact Summit
description: At the India AI Impact Summit, Western companies are pitching themselves as AI producers and they want Indians to be AI consumers. This reflects in statements from White House policy advisor Sriram to Rishi Sunak to Anthropic CEO Dario Amodei. India should keep an open mind on it, and Sarvam in its sight.

title: India's Sarvam takes on ChatGPT and Gemini with Indus AI app
description: India's Sarvam takes on ChatGPT and Gemini with Indus AI appIndia's homegrown AI startup Sarvam has quietly released its AI chat app Indus on app stores. The app is expected to work similar to ChatGPT, allowing users to interact with AI in multiple languages. However, there is a waitlist for now.

title: India's Sarvam takes on ChatGPT and Gemini with Indus AI app
description: India’s homegrown AI startup Sarvam has quietly released its AI chat app Indus on app stores. The app is expected to work similar to ChatGPT, allowing users to interact with AI in multiple languages. However, there is a waitlist for now.

title: Claude vs Grok: Which AI codes best? Elon Musk says soon it will not even matter
description: Claude vs Grok: Which AI codes best? Elon Musk says soon it will not even matterTech billionaire Elon Musk claims that soon, coding agents will become so reliable that it wouldn't matter which agent you used, be it Grok Code, or Anthropic's Claude Code, or perhaps something else.

title: Claude vs Grok: Which AI codes best? Elon Musk says soon it will not even matter
description: At a time when AI coding tools like Anthropic’s Claude Code are getting better, Elon Musk believes that coding itself will become generic before the end of this year. Musk has also teased a big update for his own coding agent, Grok code.

title: Sam Altman compares AI and human energy use, Sridhar Vembu pushes back
description: Sam Altman compares AI and human energy use, Sridhar Vembu pushes backOpenAI CEO Sam Altman has argued that humans too consume a lot of energy amid criticism over the resources used by AI data centres. Here is how Zoho co-founder Sridhar Vembu responded.

title: India AI Impact Summit
description: While chaos brought about by a huge crowd and early teething issues in logistics were real, the India AI Impact Summit 2026 subtly achieved something bigger: It proved that was no longer just an AI data market, but an emerging global stage for collaboration, investment and innovation.
